title: microsorum zosteriforme
intro: Microsorum zosteriforme, also known as the Chain Fern or Zosterophyll, is a type of tropical fern native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to protect against cell damage and promote overall health. The health benefits of Microsorum zosteriforme include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as potentially alleviating symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and high blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or tincture form, and may also be dried and used in capsules or as a powder for added convenience.
